content:
# How to Use AI for Email Marketing in 2026

Email marketing still delivers one of the best ROIs, and AI makes it even better. Let's explore how!

For more writing tools, check out [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]].

---

## Step 1: Write Better Subject Lines

Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] or ChatGPT to generate dozens of subject line variations, then test them!

Try prompts like:
- "Give me 10 catchy subject lines for a blog update email"
- "Write subject lines that create urgency without being pushy"

---

## Step 2: Personalize Your Emails

AI can help you personalize emails at scale, going beyond just using the subscriber's name.

Ideas:
- Use AI to analyze subscriber behavior and suggest content they'll love
- Write personalized opening lines based on their past interactions
- Segment your list with AI-powered analytics

---

## Step 3: Improve Your Copy with Grammarly

Use Grammarly to make sure your emails are professional, clear, and error-free.

⭐ Recommended: Upgrade to Grammarly Pro for advanced tone and clarity suggestions to make your emails really connect with readers.

---

## Step 4: Automate Your Workflow

Use productivity tools like [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] or [[link:/tools/52|ClickUp AI]] to plan your email calendar and automate repetitive tasks.

---

## Our Email Marketing AI Toolkit

| Task | Tool |
|------|------|
| Subject lines & copy | [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] |
| Editing & proofreading | Grammarly |
| Campaign planning | [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] |

Ready to get better results from your email marketing? Try these tools today!
